name: ESAB Corp
business: ESAB provides fabrication technology advanced equipment, consumables, gas control equipment, robotics, and digital solutions. The company serves customers in approximately 150 countries through independent distributors and direct salespeople.

exposures.sentence: ESAB provides its partners with fabrication technology advanced equipment, consumables, gas control equipment, robotics and digital solutions.
We define our addressable market as established fabrication technology and gas control equipment products and new products in automation, software and services.
Our gas control business is also well-positioned in attractive markets such as medical and specialty gas control.
ESAB provides its partners with fabrication technology advanced equipment, consumables, gas control equipment, robotics and digital solutions.

catalysts.sentence: On January 31, 2026, the Company entered into an agreement to acquire Eddyfi, a global leader in advanced inspection and monitoring technologies headquartered in Quebec, Canada, for approximately $1.45 billion. The acquisition is expected to be completed in mid-2026, subject to the receipt of applicable regulatory approvals and customary closing conditions.

tamClaims.claim: market expected to be approximately $45 billion by the end of 2028
tamClaims.sentence: We believe our Company, which competes in a market expected to be approximately $45 billion by the end of 2028, is one of the prominent industry players with a substantial position in every major market in the world, combining global scale with regional agility to maximize growth and profits.
